personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | AWS, PySpark, Redshift & Data Platform Engineering

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience and strong hands-on depth in Python, SQL, AWS data platforms, PySpark/Spark, Redshift, S3, Glue, ETL/ELT, dimensional modeling, and data quality automation. Built and optimized large-scale telemetry and forecasting pipelines across regulated banking environments, including AWS-based ingestion, transformation, warehouse, reporting, and observability workflows. Strong background in SQL performance tuning, production troubleshooting, pipeline validation, stakeholder communication, and translating business requirements into reliable data products. Actively expanding modern lakehouse skills in Snowflake, dbt, Delta Lake, and Databricks while bringing deep production experience in AWS, Redshift, Spark, and enterprise data engineering.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual reporting workflows with automated, repeatable data products for capacity planning and executive reporting.
Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform with S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, and Amazon Redshift for scalable forecasting workloads and historical analytics.
Migrated heavy ML forecasting workloads using Prophet and scikit-learn from on-prem Oracle into Redshift-backed cloud processing, enabling parallel forecasting and improved data availability.
Designed optimized Oracle and warehouse schemas for historical retention, dimensional reporting, and seasonal risk forecasting across large enterprise telemetry datasets.
Developed data quality and validation routines for completeness, consistency, reconciliation, and production accuracy across telemetry, capacity, and reporting pipelines.
Used Python, SQL, PySpark, Pandas, and automation scripts to troubleshoot data issues, tune transformations, and support highly visible production reporting workflows.
Integrated monitoring feeds from BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, AppDynamics, and other telemetry sources into unified reporting layers used by senior stakeholders.
Created Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly dashboards to surface operational capacity insights, utilization patterns, and infrastructure risk indicators.
Containerized Python ETL pipeline jobs on EC2/ECS, supporting scalable on-demand processing for data engineering and forecasting workloads.
Collaborated with architecture, infrastructure, and business teams to convert operational requirements into source-to-target mappings, automated pipelines, dashboards, and actionable data products.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, converting performance telemetry into optimization recommendations for engineering teams.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance metrics to identify latency patterns, availability risks, and user-impacting bottlenecks.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security with no production monitoring regression during cutover.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace to connect load testing, APM telemetry, and production-readiness analysis.
Participated in AWS cloud migration planning by assessing monitoring readiness, mobile monitoring options, and end-to-end transaction visibility.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial services client, managing 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents across enterprise systems.
Built Perl and Korn Shell automation for performance reporting and operational data extraction, reducing manual weekly export effort.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and management modules adopted as monitoring standards across client environments.
Led large-scale CA APM upgrades with zero unplanned downtime while coordinating technical teams across infrastructure, application, and operations groups.
Collaborated with J2EE/WebLogic performance teams to identify bottlenecks using telemetry, transaction traces, and infrastructure metrics.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify throughput limits and bottlenecks across JDBC pools, threads, heap memory, CPU, and garbage collection.
Installed and configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread-dump automation scripts to support real-time visibility during load testing.
Documented performance baselines and regression thresholds used by engineering teams for release readiness decisions.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster handling transaction volumes above VISA scale.
Optimized transaction processing using C++ and OCCI, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI testing framework to validate migration correctness across millions of transaction records.
Automated schema conversion and data validation processes to protect integrity throughout phased migration cutover.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE mainframe modernization project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 interfaces aligned to government system architecture standards.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed high-availability multithreaded C++ billing interfaces using POSIX threads, mutexes, semaphores, socket programming, and Marconi APIs for telecom billing platforms.
Improved C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing process performance, reducing memory usage by 75%, improving throughput by 20%, and achieving 10x database performance via sequence optimization.
Maintained and enhanced AMDOCS Flexible Bill Formatter, EDI interfaces, and Enabler/CSM/EMS modules across invoicing, settlement, and reporting workflows.
Automated WebLogic and WebSphere administration using Korn Shell scripting, reducing manual deployment steps in Unix environments.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, Shell Scripting, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting, C++, Java, PL/SQL

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built an AI-driven capacity forecasting engine using Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit to replace manual forecasting processes, reduce forecasting cycles by 90%, and predict capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead using large-scale telemetry data.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark for enterprise-scale ingestion, transformation, optimized access, and GenAI-enabled Text-to-SQL analysis.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end Python automation pipeline with semantic duplicate detection, LLM-powered scoring, resume tailoring, document rendering, quality gates, and application tracking using FAISS, sentence-transformers, Grok API, and structured JSON/YAML artifacts.
